hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit' && grep -rq 'console\.log' src/ 2>/dev/null; then echo 'BLOCKED: console.log found in src/. Remove before committing.'; exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'pnpm-lock'; then echo 'BLOCKED: edit pnpm-lock.yaml via pnpm commands only'; exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(it\.only|describe\.only|it\.skip|describe\.skip|xit\(|xdescribe\()'; then echo 'BLOCKED: test-skip syntax forbidden. Delete the test or fix it.'; exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(auth\.json|\.env)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: credential file'; exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.spec\.ts'; then cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && pnpm test --run 2>&1 | tail -30; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.ts$' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.spec\.ts$'; then cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --incremental 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
